- Top row (left to right): blue, green, yellow, purple

print(f"\nRemaining gray squares in middle: {len(gray_squares)}")
for gs in gray_squares:
    print(f"  id={gs['id']}, boundary={gs['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
